requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — UNIT Conformity Practice

summary.en: UNIT is Uruguay's national standards institute and participates in international standards work, including IEC-related standards channels. For EV supply equipment, the relevant technical safety baseline is the IEC 61851 family: IEC 61851-1 for conductive EVSE general requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment. Safety evidence should cover control-pilot behaviour, protective earthing, fault protection, isolation monitoring where applicable, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, enclosure protection, emergency stop provisions where applicable, and installation instructions suitable for Uruguay's electrical-service context.
summary.zh: UNIT是乌拉圭国家标准机构，并参与包括IEC相关标准渠道在内的国际标准工作。对于电动汽车供电设备，相关技术安全基线为IEC 61851系列：IEC 61851-1适用于传导式EVSE通用要求，IEC 61851-23适用于直流EV供电设备。安全证据应覆盖控制导引、保护接地、故障保护、适用时的绝缘监测、过流及过温保护、外壳防护、适用时的急停措施，以及适合乌拉圭电力服务环境的安装说明。
summary.zht: UNIT是烏拉圭國家標準機構，並參與包括IEC相關標準渠道在內的國際標準工作。對於電動汽車供電設備，相關技術安全基線為IEC 61851系列：IEC 61851-1適用於傳導式EVSE通用要求，IEC 61851-23適用於直流EV供電設備。安全證據應覆蓋控制導引、保護接地、故障保護、適用時的絕緣監測、過流及過溫保護、外殼防護、適用時的急停措施，以及適合烏拉圭電力服務環境的安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
UTE installation and site-acceptance requirements where applicable

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but includes China-specific connector, signalling, and communication assumptions. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design reference but does not by itself prove IEC 61851 conformity, UNIT acceptance, UTE site acceptance, or Uruguay project compliance.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号和通信假设。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计参考，但其本身不能证明IEC 61851符合性、UNIT接受、UTE站点验收或乌拉圭项目合规。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號和通訊假設。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計參考，但其本身不能證明IEC 61851符合性、UNIT接受、UTE站點驗收或烏拉圭項目合規。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, enclosure protection certificates, protective-device ratings, leakage-current and earthing evidence, Spanish installation and safety documentation where required, and a Uruguay site-specific installation package. A standalone GB/T 18487 report is not a direct IEC 61851 or Uruguay acceptance substitute without a clause-level gap assessment.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、认可IEC安全测试报告、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、外壳防护证书、保护器件额定值、漏电流和接地证据、按要求提供西班牙语安装及安全文件，以及乌拉圭站点专用安装资料包。单独的GB/T 18487报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不能直接替代IEC 61851或乌拉圭验收。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、認可IEC安全測試報告、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、外殼防護證書、保護器件額定值、漏電流和接地證據、按要求提供西班牙語安裝及安全文件，以及烏拉圭站點專用安裝資料包。單獨的GB/T 18487報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不能直接替代IEC 61851或烏拉圭驗收。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 61851, UNIT-adopted standards, UTE tender requirements, or site-owner specifications require IEC safety evidence; confirm exact standard editions and conformity route for the product
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence without additional assessment or testing

source.publisher: UNIT — Instituto Uruguayo de Normas Técnicas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Uruguay-facing EVSE documentation should include IEC 61851 safety evidence, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence where applicable, enclosure and protective-device documentation, and installation materials suitable for UTE and local site review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向乌拉圭的EVSE文件应包括IEC 61851安全证据、适用时的直流充电站IEC 61851-23证据、外壳及保护器件文件，以及适合UTE和当地站点审查的安装资料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向烏拉圭的EVSE文件應包括IEC 61851安全證據、適用時的直流充電站IEC 61851-23證據、外殼及保護器件文件，以及適合UTE和當地站點審查的安裝資料。
